title: Crispy Pork Shoulder Crumble
description: A mouthwatering dish that combines the crispiest pork with a delightful crumble topping.
instructions: Season the pork shoulder with salt.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork shoulder until browned on all sides.
Transfer the pork to a baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix crispy breadcrumbs and crumble topping.
Sprinkle the breadcrumb mixture evenly over the pork shoulder.
Broil for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Let the pork rest for 5 minutes before serving.
